name: vault
description: An MCP plugin for persistent agent memory, vault selection, record storage, facts, links, journals, and checkpoint hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent agent memory through MCP tools
interface.longDescription: Vault exposes MCP tools for choosing an active vault, storing verbatim records, writing facts and links, journaling session checkpoints, searching saved context, and keeping multiple vaults organized across Codex and Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Switch me to my work vault.
Search the vault for recent decisions.
